name: Savings USG
redeem: sUSG is Tangent's Yearn v3-style savings vault for USG. Tangent docs say sUSG can be minted and redeemed for USG without fee or delay, with yield autocompounded into the USG-per-sUSG index. The underlying USG stablecoin does not redeem directly for collateral; its peg relies on overcollateralized debt markets, dynamic rates/reward cuts, Peg Keepers, and secondary-market liquidity.
notes: Onchain asset is USG. Structure is simple at the sUSG layer, but underlying USG has no direct collateral redemption, is described by docs as beta/experimental, and depends on Tangent governance-controlled parameters and peg mechanisms.
